prompt: trying to figure out which kinds of compiler warnings our build is emitting — want a count grouped by warning type so we know what to prioritize fixing. The build bundle is at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`

assertions.name: groups-by-warning-type
assertions.description: Output presents warnings grouped by type (DeprecatedDeclaration, No-usage, Swift Compiler Warning, ActorIsolatedCall, etc.) with explicit counts per type.

assertions.name: uses-peekie-warnings
assertions.description: Output uses `peekie warnings` (visible in any displayed command, recipe, or by the fact that compiler-warning-only counts are returned). If output mixes errors and warnings without flagging the distinction, the assertion is partial.

assertions.name: actionable-prioritization-context
assertions.description: Output gives the user something prioritization-actionable — at minimum the type with the highest count, optionally a one-line interpretation.
